creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Update to v0.10.0.

Following files are changed in this release:

* Makefile
* distinfo
* pkg-plist

Following files are deleted in this release:

* files/patch-ggadget_module.cc

Fix: PORTNAME=      google-gadgets
-PORTVERSION=   0.9.3
+PORTVERSION=   0.10.0
 CATEGORIES=    deskutils  
 MASTER_SITES=  http://google-gadgets-for-linux.googlecode.com/files/
 DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}-for-linux-${PORTVERSION}
